programs.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programs.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programs.title: Emergency
programs.desc: Royal Melbourne Emergency’s Dr Mya and Nurse Ebony brace themselves as paramedics bring in a man who’s been on a two-day drug bender. Dr Emma calls in back-up to save a mum who’s clinging to life after a high-speed crash.
